item10_financing.notes: No financing offered of any kind

restaurant_managers.on_site_requirement: At least one during all operating hours

item16_sales_restrictions.menu_control: Only approved items; no limit on franchisor's right to add/remove
item16_sales_restrictions.pricing_control: May set min/max prices (Menu Item Price Policy); violation = royalty increase to 8%
item16_sales_restrictions.internet_presence: No website/social media/apps without written consent
item16_sales_restrictions.entertainment: No vending/gaming devices without consent; franchisor may require specific music/TV
item16_sales_restrictions.wholesale: No shipping, wholesale, or third-party distribution without consent

item18_public_figure.name: Gordon Ramsay
item18_public_figure.title: International celebrity chef
item18_public_figure.ownership: 49% indirect owner of GRNA Holdings Inc. (ultimate parent)
item18_public_figure.compensation: No direct compensation for endorsement or use of name/image
item18_public_figure.indirect_benefit: May receive indirect financial benefit from franchise fees through ownership interest
item18_public_figure.involvement: Not involved in day-to-day management or control
item18_public_figure.promotional_use: Name and image used in marketing materials; may make personal promotional appearances; may appear in social media ads, brochures, videos
item18_public_figure.investment: No direct investment in the franchisor entity (GRNA FC Group LLC)
